section_miscategorizations.text: Blood pressure measured 180/95 at ER presentation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: In the Subjective section, this ER blood pressure is explicitly reported as something the patient states ("He reports his blood pressure was elevated at the ER, around 180/95"). In the Objective section it is restated as an observed vital without attribution, which could imply it was directly measured at this visit. Since this value is historical and patient-reported rather than a current clinician-measured vital, it more properly belongs in S; however, the misplacement is minor and not substantially misleading.
